grader.method: Fresh blind review of every current canonical reader-snapshot block in exact top-to-bottom page order; holistic judgments were frozen before structural and fingerprint validation.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Coherent five-phase path from next-token mechanics to dependable systems.
wholePageReview.feedback: Accurate promise, clear cumulative arc, honest fixture boundaries, and useful next action; advanced branches are correctly presented as parallel specializations.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Beginner-first path from useful language tasks to evidence and authority boundaries.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page sustains one meeting-notes example, explains generation without anthropomorphism, and tests supplied text, live facts, expert judgment, and authorized action through diagnostic changed cases.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Axis-naming and contraction build a dependable shape-reading discipline.
wholePageReview.feedback: The arithmetic, shape semantics, broadcasting contrast, runnable NumPy projection, and attention-mask boundary all agree; transfer tests both valid multiplication and silent semantic broadcasts.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Relative logits become probabilities, target loss, and calibrated evidence questions.
wholePageReview.feedback: Stable softmax, negative-log arithmetic, entropy/perplexity/calibration distinctions, masking, and the lab readouts are correct and converge on a strong unfamiliar-case transfer.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Forward values, local sensitivities, chain rule, and optimizer boundary form one trace.
wholePageReview.feedback: Hand arithmetic, autograd, matrix-gradient shapes, branching, and oversized-step contrast are correct; the page clearly separates differentiation from the later choice of update rule.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Optimizer state and schedules culminate in a reproducible complete learning-step capstone.
wholePageReview.feedback: SGD, momentum, Adam, AdamW, warmup, memory cost, and failure diagnosis are accurate; the staged numerical project correctly verifies forward, backward, update, and finite-difference evidence.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Finite vocabularies, subword segmentation, IDs, and deployment costs are traced end to end.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page accurately connects Unicode and bytes to segmentation, model-specific IDs, context cost, multilingual/code edge cases, round trips, and a pinned optional tokenizer contract test.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Arbitrary IDs become learned rows, then contextual states and vocabulary scores.
wholePageReview.feedback: Lookup shapes, repeated-ID identity, contextual polysemy, similarity limits, weight tying, controlled transfer, and the pinned hidden-state test form an accurate and cumulative explanation.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Permutation symmetry, causal access, positional geometry, and long-context evidence are cleanly separated.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page precisely distinguishes unmasked equivariance from causal masking, compares absolute, relative, and rotary insertion points, and requires falsifiable order and retrieval tests beyond configured capacity.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Query-key scoring, masking, value retrieval, heads, and residual writes are traced coherently.
wholePageReview.feedback: Shapes, scale, mask order, normalization axis, weighted-value output, multi-head composition, and causal versus bidirectional access are correct; intervention boundaries prevent heatmap overclaiming.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A pre-norm block is presented as same-width communication and local feature updates.
wholePageReview.feedback: Residual interfaces, normalization placement, attention/MLP roles, depth heuristics, post-norm conversion limits, and distributed representation cautions align across code and changed-case transfer.

wholePageReview.synopsis: Shifted labels, causal teacher forcing, packed boundaries, and token loss become one training contract.
wholePageReview.feedback: The valid-target counts, [B,T,V] alignment, EOS supervision, segment isolation, prompt/padding masks, and exposure mismatch are technically exact and tested through a realistic packed-document case.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The architecture spine expands into a tested tiny-GPT system and controlled experiment.
wholePageReview.feedback: Every major shape, shifted loss, causal invariant, overfit test, resume state, held-out split, ablation contract, artifact, and nanochat evidence boundary is explicit and mutually consistent.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A complete systems-level view of pre-training from governed data through recovery-aware distributed optimization.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page connects next-token learning, token accounting, masking, communication, telemetry, evaluation, and checkpoint recovery with accurate arithmetic and strong changed-case decisions.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A rigorous explanation of how shifted targets, visibility rules, loss masks, and trainable architecture jointly define learning.
wholePageReview.feedback: Accurate causal traces, runnable mask construction, failure signatures, and a tool-conversation transfer case make objective correctness observable without confusing visibility with supervision.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A disciplined treatment of scaling as empirical resource allocation rather than a universal recipe.
wholePageReview.feedback: The equal-compute arithmetic is correct, confounds are explicit, and the deployment-boundary transfer task turns uncertain scaling evidence into an auditable decision process.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A governed, auditable data-pipeline lesson that makes distribution design, contamination, rights, and representation inseparable.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page is unusually complete: document-level splitting, reversible lineage, slice audits, benchmark repair, and a seven-case corpus studio all reinforce defensible data decisions.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A precise systems lesson linking memory ownership, parallel partitions, network topology, numerical health, and exact recovery.
wholePageReview.feedback: The four-axis comparison, 7B memory trace, topology diagnosis, and kill-and-resume contract are technically strong and keep throughput evidence separate from correctness.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A deployment-interface-first comparison of causal, masked, span-corruption, infilling, and mixed objectives.
wholePageReview.feedback: The FIM serialization is explicit, objective conflicts are tested under matched budgets, and the pinned optional ablation cleanly separates a teaching fixture from measured evidence.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A protocol-centered evaluation lesson separating objective fit, capability, contamination, uncertainty, and systems health.
wholePageReview.feedback: Tokenizer-dependent perplexity, frozen protocols, slice-level uncertainty, and predeclared stop-or-repair gates are integrated into concrete checkpoint decisions without collapsing evidence into one score.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A full pre-training capstone that turns OLMo 3's open stage flow into falsifiable, stage-specific engineering claims.
wholePageReview.feedback: Named token budgets, matched stage controls, reported-versus-inferred labels, capstone artifacts, and a narrow mini-replication proposal support unusually strong synthesis and transfer.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A crisp bridge that maps behavior failures to demonstrations, preferences, verifiable rewards, retrieval, or runtime authority.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page distinguishes SFT, DPO, RL, tools, and safety without synonym collapse, and its stale-policy/authorization cases enforce the crucial boundary between learned proposals and real permissions.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A complete post-training map organized around observable behavior, appropriate supervision, and regression-aware iteration.
wholePageReview.feedback: The refusal boundary, stage-minimization cases, teaching fixture gates, and open-recipe ledger show why behavior, capability, safety, verification, and runtime authority need separate evidence.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A deeply practical SFT lesson that follows demonstrations from provenance and serialization through assistant-only masking, QLoRA, evaluation, and packaging.
wholePageReview.feedback: The repaired shifted-label trace and explicit mask assertion make the core learning contract correct and inspectable; the optional workshop adds pinned revisions, readiness gates, regression budgets, and rollback-ready artifacts.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A mathematically careful preference lesson spanning rubric design, DPO log-ratio margins, reference anchoring, shortcuts, and drift.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page handles the easily confused beta conventions explicitly, verifies the numeric margin, and uses matched-length, blinded, task-specific transfer cases to expose annotation-policy bias.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A clear first-principles translation of token generation into trajectories, delayed returns, advantages, and conservative policy updates.
wholePageReview.feedback: The arithmetic, policy-gradient sign, delayed-credit case, and reward-boundary transfer task are correct and observable, with strong warnings about noisy outcomes, proxy gaps, and policy drift.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A rigorous classic RLHF pipeline from SFT and comparisons through reward fitting, current-policy rollouts, PPO-style updates, and KL control.
wholePageReview.feedback: Each stage's artifact and failure mode is distinct, the clipped-ratio and KL arithmetic is concrete, and reward hacking is tested against independent, non-compensable quality gates.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A security-minded tool-use lesson that treats model output as an untrusted proposal inside deterministic authority boundaries.
wholePageReview.feedback: Typed schemas, least privilege, confirmation, idempotency, receipts, injection handling, and separate harmful-compliance versus false-refusal gates make the full action lifecycle inspectable and transferable.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A cumulative post-training capstone matching demonstrations, preferences, exact verifiers, evolving rubrics, and runtime controls to distinct answer spaces.
wholePageReview.feedback: The Tülu-to-DR-Tulu flow, dual-purpose project, staged controls, attack tests, and non-compensable launch gates produce a coherent, current, evidence-bounded synthesis.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A numerically grounded decoding lesson from logits and temperature through nucleus truncation, renormalization, selection, and stopping.
wholePageReview.feedback: All softmax and top-p calculations check out, the runnable sampler is transparent, and task-specific transfer ties diversity or determinism to independent quality and safety gates.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A precise trace of prefill, sequential decode, immutable past K/V reuse, cache arithmetic, and serving allocation.
wholePageReview.feedback: The projection and attention-work comparison is explicit, cache-size calculations are correct, and shared-prefix transfer adds tenant isolation, invalidation, and uncached-logit correctness checks.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A systems-and-numerics treatment of low-bit storage, scaling granularity, reconstruction error, calibration, kernels, and total inference memory.
wholePageReview.feedback: The signed-grid arithmetic and runnable vector example are exact, while the deployment fixture and rare-slice case prevent bit width or aggregate perplexity from standing in for measured service quality.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A production-oriented serving lesson separating latency, throughput, utilization, goodput, batching, queueing, and overload policy.
wholePageReview.feedback: The goodput arithmetic and static-slot ledger are correct, and numeric per-tier SLOs plus open-loop, tail, and request-shape slices make scheduling decisions testable.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A careful account of inference-time search as candidate generation, independent selection, adaptive budgeting, and value-of-compute measurement.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page sharply separates oracle pass@N from deployable best-of-N, adds bounded escalation and stopping, and culminates in a reproducible service benchmark spanning quality, memory, latency, and cost.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A complete context-engineering chapter that treats prompts as versioned information-and-control interfaces, then connects ordering, provenance, budgeting, perturbation tests, and runtime authority through worked traces and transfer checks.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page is technically careful, unusually concrete about token-budget arithmetic and hostile retrieved text, and pedagogically closes the loop from prediction to a three-part unfamiliar-case decision. The evidence boundary is explicit throughout; the browser score is correctly labeled illustrative rather than empirical.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A stage-aware RAG lesson that follows versioned evidence from structured ingestion through authorized retrieval, reranking, context assembly, citation validation, and abstention while separating retrieval failure from generation failure.
wholePageReview.feedback: The lesson is accurate about similarity, citation, permission, and grounding boundaries, and the oracle-context diagnosis gives beginners a powerful causal debugging tool. Its multilingual transfer case and separate retrieval-versus-generation measures make the assessment demanding and genuinely transferable.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A safety-first treatment of tool-using systems that distinguishes fixed workflows from bounded agent loops and makes the orchestrator’s ownership of state, authorization, idempotency, budgets, recovery, and termination explicit.
wholePageReview.feedback: The chapter teaches agentic behavior as a controlled state machine rather than mystique, with excellent partial-side-effect and ambiguous-timeout reasoning. Prediction-led pseudocode, a sold-out-booking trace, and the hybrid-workflow transfer case provide concrete, locally checkable evidence of understanding.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A rigorous evaluation-design chapter that starts from product decisions and failure costs, triangulates deterministic, human, and calibrated model graders, and requires paired uncertainty, critical slices, reproducible evidence, and explicit release gates.
wholePageReview.feedback: This page treats evaluation as a fallible measurement system and makes judge calibration, position bias, construct validity, and severity-weighted regressions concrete. Numeric portfolio gates, slice-aware code adaptation, and a regulated-case transfer exercise support both beginner comprehension and advanced practice.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A layered-security lesson that models every model input and output as untrusted, maps assets and trust boundaries, and places authorization, data minimization, isolation, validation, confirmation, telemetry, and incident response outside prompt text.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page is technically precise about indirect injection and cross-tenant retrieval, and it repeatedly distinguishes instruction provenance from authenticated capability. The resume-screening transfer task broadens the mechanism to privacy, fairness, auditability, and appeal without pretending that prompting or fine-tuning creates a security boundary.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A production-operations chapter and cumulative capstone that links privacy-aware end-to-end traces, stage metrics, SLOs, cost attribution, release gates, canaries, rollback, incident ownership, and regression evidence to a bounded source-grounded agent.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page makes telemetry actionable by pairing every signal with diagnosis, ownership, thresholds, and recovery, while explicitly rejecting indiscriminate prompt retention. Its 6–10 hour capstone includes staged goals, local completeness checks, an evidence rubric, gated exemplars, a machine-readable artifact, pinned sources, and a concrete incident drill.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A compact but deep distillation lesson that distinguishes response, logit, and feature transfer; derives softened KL supervision; and evaluates teacher quality, student capacity, data coverage, calibration, inherited errors, and full lifecycle cost.
wholePageReview.feedback: The soft-target trace, temperature code, narrow-domain coverage example, and response-only API transfer case make the core trade-offs observable and testable. A minor technical refinement would distinguish standard sequence-level teacher-generated targets from specifically on-policy methods that expose the student to its own rollout states.
revisionPriorities: Clarify that standard sequence-level distillation commonly trains on teacher-generated sequence prefixes, while on-policy variants specifically collect supervision on student-visited states.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A mathematically explicit LoRA lesson that derives the low-rank update and parameter savings, exposes zero-delta initialization gradients in runnable PyTorch, and connects rank, target modules, QLoRA, serving, provenance, isolation, and rollback.
wholePageReview.feedback: Shapes, arithmetic, scaling, initialization, and memory boundaries are consistently correct and visible. The page goes beyond a toy derivation by testing diagnosis of underfitting, comparing full tuning with LoRA and a clearly labeled QLoRA fixture, and requiring a defensible multi-tenant deployment decision.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A systems-aware MoE lesson that traces per-token top-k routing, exact weighted combination, capacity arithmetic, load balancing, overflow policy, expert parallelism, and the gap between nominal active FLOPs and real memory, communication, and latency.
wholePageReview.feedback: The numeric router and residual trace is precise, while the hand-authored lab explicitly avoids pretending experts have clean semantic names. Capacity, overflow, all-to-all communication, small expert batches, and hot-expert diagnosis are integrated into assessments that test both algorithmic understanding and production judgment.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A modality-agnostic multimodal lesson that traces patches or frames through encoders, connectors, projection, cross-attention, or unified token streams and separates preprocessing, perception, localization, fusion, reasoning, and generation failures.
wholePageReview.feedback: The patch-count arithmetic and runnable tensor reshaping make token budgets tangible, while explicit ablations and counterfactuals prevent fluent text from being mistaken for grounded perception. The changed audio case demonstrates real transfer beyond the vision examples and preserves temporal-order and oracle-evaluation reasoning.

wholePageReview.synopsis: A claim-disciplined interpretability and editing chapter that separates behavior, attribution, decodability, and intervention; teaches controlled activation patching; and evaluates edits for efficacy, generalization, locality, robustness, persistence, and operational fit.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page consistently limits causal claims to matched interventions and controls, rejects attention or probes as complete mechanisms, and treats editing as a blast-radius decision. Its capstone adds pinned hooks and revisions, sham and neighbor controls, effect intervals, a gated exemplar, a reproducible artifact, rollback, and explicit unlearning threat-model boundaries.
